$comment: Controls what gets excluded when syncing machine -> repo. Edit freely.

$notes.keywords: Case-insensitive substring match against item names/ids. Catches future MS additions automatically.
$notes.deny: Exact item names to always exclude even when no keyword matches (e.g. M365-internal skills).
$notes.allow: Exact item names to always KEEP even if a keyword matched (overrides keywords + deny).
